subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Mwingilo.kukeba keba bya kisemwa lyetu bileta buyukishe mu bya mingilo.
topics: Kukebakeba bya kisemwa byetu bileta buyukishe mu bya mingilo.
Mufunjishi akambizhe bafunda kukeba keba bya kisemwa bileta buyukishe mu bya
